arms.sham_derangement: seeded Sattolo cycle (guaranteed no fixed point) for n>=2
arms.sham_singleton_fallback: attribution neutralized (sign 0, not admitted); scientific null: no attribution information; occurrence ledgered

budget.on_core_overrun: NO_CONFIRMATORY; arms are never silently dropped

clocks.forecast_admissible: enrolled AND trading open AND input_at < forecast_at < prediction_cutoff AND no known outcome_public_time <= forecast_at AND question not quarantined
clocks.ledger_model: immutable scoped event log; state = pure fold in canonical (t, source, msg_id) order; illegal transitions quarantine the question fail-closed; invalid events dead-lettered without consuming idempotency keys
clocks.negrisk_invariant: at most one terminal yes per group; violation quarantines the whole group

follow_up_cutoff_utc.freeze_procedure: canonical UTC instant frozen at preregistration (LOCK); every settlement row must satisfy resolved_at_utc <= cutoff — any later-settling market enters the frozen censoring rule instead; confirmatory analysis REFUSES to run while PENDING (R14-3)

assignment.noncompliance: ITT: trajectories analyzed as randomized regardless of runtime failures; failure receipts ledgered
assignment.seed_schedule: assignment_seed = sha256(prereg_root_hash + '|assign|' + wave); per_trajectory_seed = sha256(prereg_root_hash + '|traj|' + trajectory_index); domain-separated, recorded in assignment ledger before first forecast; serialization (r13 P1-13-4): prereg_root_hash and the literal separators are UTF-8-encoded, wave/trajectory_index rendered as base-10 integers, and seed = int(sha256_hexdigest[:16], 16) — a 64-bit truncation, frozen

trajectories_per_arm_K.freeze_procedure: gate G6 simulation output; frozen at preregistration

contrasts.coprimary_success_rule: each contrast is independently reportable; paper headline requires at least one four-way branch other than inconclusive under Bonferroni-simultaneous intervals
contrasts.estimator: within-wave contrast mean (blocked-design-compatible); crossed bootstrap resamples complete WAVES x FAMILIES; Bonferroni NOMINAL simultaneous percentile CIs at 1-alpha/2; actual coverage certified only by production G6 simulation
contrasts.orientation: tau = mean_brier(arm_a) - mean_brier(arm_b); negative tau favors arm_a

smallest_worthwhile_effect.freeze_procedure: decision-meaning document written and hashed BEFORE gate G6 runs; defined on per-market mean Brier scale; independent of pilot effect estimates

contrasts.bootstrap_seed_schedule: boot_seed = int(sha256(prereg_root_hash + '|boot|' + contrast_id + '|' + inputs_digest).hexdigest()[:16], 16) where inputs_digest = sha256 over the sorted content shas of all five ledgers; UTF-8, base-10, 64-bit truncation; NO caller override at the confirmatory entry point (R14-4)

decision_rule.equivalence_requires: Bonferroni-simultaneous CI fully inside [-delta, +delta]; p>0.05 never treated as equivalence
decision_rule.harm_mechanism_note: harm identifies frozen-policy relative harm only; credit-contamination interpretation requires common updater + compute-matched sham + placebo suite + mediator diagnostics jointly

endpoint.brier_convention: (q - y)^2 with y in {0,1}; lower is better
endpoint.cumulative_mapping: cumulative = mean * n_eligible; delta is defined on the mean scale so horizon affects precision, not MCID units
endpoint.failure_note: any invalid/missing forecast scores worst-case loss 1.0 in the primary analysis (strategic missingness can never help); sensitivity analysis at 0.25 preregistered; per-arm failure rates ledgered and monitored

horizon_T.freeze_procedure: output of gate G6 simulation; frozen at preregistration

endpoint.too_early_handling: not_terminal; question stays open under next proposal round

inclusion_rulebook.freeze_procedure: enrollment rulebook doc + hash frozen before first confirmatory acquisition; checked by gate G5a

memory_policy_common.magnitude_semantics: scale-free quantized credit ratio is stored per item and drives retrieval weighting and eviction, so fine-grained credit VALUES (not only rank/sign) shape memory behavior

meta.identity_en: A preregistered prospective comparative-effectiveness study of complete multi-agent credit-conditioned external-memory policies on real prediction-market events, using pre-outcome forecast commitments, delayed-resolution update clocks, and a recomputable intervention ledger.
meta.implementation_status_honest: runnable scaffold under repair contract E0-E12; NOT a freezable experiment system
meta.novelty_scope: to our knowledge, under the registered search protocol
meta.supersedes: p1_v5 5.3.1/5.4 line (round-11 E3/E4 BLOCK: 5 P0s incl. after_cursor, closed!=settled, unledgered ITT, ephemeral transcripts, unbound G7a)

offline_analyses.reason_offline: trajectory budget reserved for H1 power

placebo_suite.justification: covers compute/content confound (sham), estimator validity vs known truth (planted oracle), credit-specificity without lookahead (in-batch permutation)

replaced_arms.reason: A07 lookahead + A20 compute confound resolved jointly (D5/D7 option 2)

rights.clean_path: written permission letter to Polymarket for price-data artifact

score_invariance.contract: memory pipeline consumes raw (q, y) records and computes credits under the internal canonical Brier convention; published-score affine conventions are a reporting layer with no code path into memory, so convention-independence holds by construction
score_invariance.quantization: credits ranked on ratio to batch max-abs credit rounded to 9 significant digits; quantized zero gets sign 0 and is not admitted; quantized ratio is the scale-free relative magnitude
score_invariance.reporting_note: admissible_domain applies to published-score reporting transforms only, never to memory

artifact.freeze_procedure: theorem + assumptions + proof + sign/rank/ties/clipping cases in docs/theory_h3.md with discovered test tests/test_theory_h3.py; content receipt (test exit 0) required by FREEZE

theory_h3.claim: analytic sign/rank regions for Brier counterfactual credit under latent event probability
